title: AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 21 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN TAGAYTAY CITY, PROVINCE OF CAVITE IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDATION DAY TO BE KNOWN AS "CHARTER DAY OF TAGAYTAY CITY" OR "ARAW NG LUNGSOD NG TAGAYTAY," AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10775

chunks.text:
Daily Tribune, May 6, 2022; 118 OG No. 20, 5600 (May 16, 2022)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11727, April 29, 2022 ]

AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 21 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN TAGAYTAY CITY, PROVINCE OF CAVITE IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDATION DAY TO BE KNOWN AS "CHARTER DAY OF TAGAYTAY CITY" OR "ARAW NG LUNGSOD NG TAGAYTAY," AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10775

By it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section of Republic Act No. 10775 is hereby amended to read as follows:

"SECTION 1. June 21 of every year is hereby declared as special nonworking holiday in Tagaytay City, Province of Cavite in commemoration of its foundation day to be known as "Charter Day of Tagaytay City" or "Araw ng Lungsod ng Tagaytay".

SEC. 2. Section 2 of Republic Act No. 10775 is hereby repealed.

SEC. 2. Section 2 of Republic Act No. 10775 is hereby repealed.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

LORD ALLAN JAY Q. VELASCO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on December 17, 2019 and January 31, 2022, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARK LLANDRO L. MENDOZA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 29 2022

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
